turns.text: Thanks for calling Sears Home Services — what appliance can I help you with today?
Hi, I need help with my dryer.
Sorry to hear that — what's the brand/model, and what's happening?
Thanks — and what's happening with it?
There's smoke coming out of the dryer vent.

Please stop what you're doing right now: shut off power/gas to the dryer immediately and step away. This isn't something to keep troubleshooting over the phone — you'll want a professional to take a look. Would you like me to get a technician scheduled?
Okay, I'll turn it off right now.
Good — safety first. Should I go ahead and get a technician out to you?

symptoms.description: there's smoke coming out of the dryer vent

steps_given: Shut off power/gas to the dryer immediately.
Do not attempt further troubleshooting until a technician inspects it.
